header.warning: Use Google Chrome or Opera for a better experience. Edge is reported as not compatible!

desc.title: Why using this tool?
desc.p1: Upload multiple images and instantly replace specific colors in bulk. Perfect for updating textures and sprites! Features include Pan & Zoom, Split View, Global Hue shift, and Preserve Shading for seamless colorization.
desc.donate_full:
⚠️ If you have cool ideas, suggest them in our official discord server.
If you found this tool useful, consider making a donation for our hard work. We appreciate it!

preview.placeholder_desc: Upload images to see the preview

settings.scale_warning: Large images may take longer to process and could slow down your browser.
